summary: Completed comprehensive testing of POS system MVP. All core features tested and working: JWT authentication, role-based access control, products CRUD, billing with cart management, bills history, staff management, dashboard analytics. Both backend APIs (24/24 tests passed) and frontend UI flows tested successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing aria-describedby attributes causing accessibility warnings
Emergent badge occasionally overlaps UPI payment button

passed_tests: Dashboard metrics display (sales today, bills count, revenue, top items)
Products CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Billing flow with cart management (add/remove items, quantity controls)
Bill generation with Cash and UPI payment types
Cashier login and role-based access control
Role-based navigation (Owner sees all, Cashier only billing)
Product search and filtering in billing
